title: cayratia grandifolia
intro: Cayratia grandifolia, also known as the five-angle vine or five-angled moonseed, is a perennial climber belonging to the grape family (Vitaceae). This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cayratia grandifolia include relief from fever, pain, and inflammation, as well as the treatment of various skin conditions and respiratory problems. Cayratia grandifolia can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine, particularly in Asian cultures.
